text.title: Six Core Principles (PMBOK 7) Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the six-core-principles methodology end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and a decision-gate that maps to a rule.

step.name: principle_observable_required
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Every principle audit score must cite at least one observable artefact (decision log entry, retro line, satisfaction score).
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `principle-observable-required` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: value_focus_evidence
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: 'Focus on Value' must show at least one decision where scope was cut to protect outcome value.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `value-focus-evidence` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: quality_embedded
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: 'Embed Quality' must point to a quality gate that ran and failed at least once (i.e., is real, not theatre).
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `quality-embedded` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: accountable_leadership_named
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: 'Lead Accountably' must name a single accountable owner per major decision (no consensus blur).
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `accountable-leadership-named` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: empowered_teams_decisions
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: 'Build Empowered Teams' must show ≥3 decisions in 90 days made by the team without escalation.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `empowered-teams-decisions` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: validate_and_record
step.action: Run `scripts/validate-six-core-principles.py --file artefact.json`. Record output under `## Status` in the artefact.
step.output: Exit 0 = artefact accepted; exit 1 = violations listed; exit 2 = usage error.
step.decision-gate: Validator MUST return 0 before downstream consumption.
